# commands

Extracts `defineCommand()` definitions from each plugin's `web/commands.ts`.
No `relate()` — commands have no cross-plugin relationships.

First facet sub-plugin, used as the reference implementation for the facet
pattern. The `Facet` interface and `defineFacet` come from `facets/core`;
parsing helpers (`parseDefineGroup`, `stripTypes`, `readIfExists`) come from
`plugin-tree/core`.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Exports (core):
  - Types: `CommandDef`
  - Values: `commandsFacetDef`
